mapper.select: SELECT LICENSE_CODE as licenseCode, LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM LICENSE ORDER BY LICENSE_CODE ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUESTION Q JOIN "USER" U ON (Q.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE Q.STATUS = 'Y' AND Q.LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND Q.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND U.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND Q.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME as licenseName, U.NICKNAME as nickname FROM QUESTION Q JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) JOIN "USER" U ON (Q.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE Q.STATUS = 'Y'
AND Q.LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND Q.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND U.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND Q.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY Q.Q_INDEX DESC

SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME AS licenseName, U.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM QUESTION Q LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON (Q.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) WHERE Q.Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND Q.STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME as licenseName, U.NICKNAME as nickname FROM QUESTION Q JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON (Q.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE Q.Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND Q.STATUS != 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE Q_INDEX = #{qIndex}
UPDATE QUESTION SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE Q_INDEX = #{qIndex}
mapper.select: SELECT A.A_INDEX as aIndex, A.CONTENT, A.CREATE_DATE as createDate, A.STATUS, A.Q_INDEX as qIndex, A.USER_ID as userId, U.NICKNAME as nickname FROM ANSWER A LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON (A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE A.Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND A.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY A.A_INDEX DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ANSWER SET CONTENT = #{content} WHERE A_INDEX = #{aIndex}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Q.*, U.NICKNAME as nickname FROM QUESTION Q LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON (Q.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE Q.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY Q.Q_INDEX DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
